profile.name: Joel Jojy
profile.headline: I design useful interfaces that feel human.
profile.intro: I shape mobile and web experiences from messy ideas into crisp, human interfaces.

about.heading: I turn research, flows, and pixels into products people can actually use.
about.copy: I enjoy solving real problems through thoughtful, human-centered design.

approach.title: Research the real problem
approach.copy: I start by clarifying user needs, product goals, and the points where the current journey breaks down.

approach.title: Structure the flow
approach.copy: I map the experience into screens, states, and decisions so the interface has a clear path before visual polish begins.

approach.title: Prototype the feeling
approach.copy: I use motion, microcopy, and interaction details to test whether the product feels simple and intentional.

approach.title: Refine the system
approach.copy: I turn the strongest direction into reusable patterns that stay consistent as the product grows.

projects.title: BankDash
projects.summary: A unified fintech platform that simplifies complex financial management.

projects.title: Mobile Banking Redesign
projects.summary: A calmer account overview and faster transfer flow for a finance app concept.

projects.title: Studio Booking Dashboard
projects.summary: A scheduling experience that helps teams scan bookings, resolve conflicts, and confirm details.

projects.title: Wellness Onboarding
projects.summary: A friendly first-run journey that gathers goals without making the product feel heavy.

contact.heading: Let's make the next interface feel obvious.
contact.copy: For freelance work, product design roles, or collaboration notes, send a message.
